technical_challenges.title: Low Memory Android Camera Crash
technical_challenges.summary: Solved image upload crashes on low-memory Android devices by implementing streaming camera capture, smart image decoding, and device-adaptive optimizations.

non_technical_challenges.title: Transition from Mechatronics to Software Development
non_technical_challenges.summary: Despite not getting a CSE or IT seat due to low cutoff marks, pursued NxtWave Full Stack Development alongside college for four years and built strong software engineering skills.

detailed_responses.technical: I faced a critical issue in my SecureChat app where image uploads were crashing on low-memory Android devices with 4GB RAM. The app would freeze or crash when users tried to capture or upload photos. After debugging, I identified the root cause as loading full-resolution images directly into memory. I solved this by implementing streaming camera capture, smart image decoding with BitmapFactory options to downsample images, and device-adaptive optimizations that detect available memory and adjust image quality accordingly. This completely eliminated the crash.
detailed_responses.non_technical: I faced a significant challenge during my college admission. Due to my lower cutoff marks, I was unable to get a CSE or IT seat. I joined Mechatronics and simultaneously pursued NxtWave's Full Stack Development program. For four years, I balanced both college studies and software development training, which helped me become a strong developer.
